pageTitle: Ask to adjourn (delay) the court hearing
caption: Make an application
heading: Ask to adjourn (delay) the court hearing
paragraph1: You can ask the court to adjourn (delay) the court hearing (move it to a later date or time). This means that you can ask to change the date and time when the hearing is due to take place.
paragraph2: You will need to show that you have a good reason to delay the hearing, and you may not be successful.
